transcript:
Good morning everyone, and welcome to Breakpoint 2025. We're so excited to have you here today with us. This year on Day 1, we wanted to create something a little different: a curated closed-door experience for the top asset allocators in the world. A place where you can ask honest questions, learn from your peers, connect with them, and hopefully walk away with long-term relationships that turn into long-term allocations into the Solana ecosystem. And we've packed Day 1 with exactly just that. You're going to hear product keynotes, debates, manager spotlights, case studies, fireside chats, and workshops all day. All designed to help you understand how digital assets fit into an allocator's portfolio today.

So here's a quick look at what's happening this morning. So we will have Ex-Bam kick us off with an opening keynote and macro teaching from the one and only Raoul Pal. Followed by a practical session on how to allocate into the digital assets portfolio and the menu of options for institutional LPs. Then we will have a deep dive into how to generate alpha across different digital asset hedge fund landscape. And finally, we will wrap up the morning sessions with some real-world examples of income generating strategies on Solana.

After lunch, we'll switch gears into the Bitwise section, which dives deep into the Solana's strategic role in today's portfolios. First, we'll hear an overview of Solana's unique role within a diversified portfolio asset allocation perspective from Multicoin co-founder and forward industry chairman Kyle Samani. And then we will take a look at how Solana is positioned to power the global financial infrastructure, from tokenized equities to DePINs to the next generation payment systems.

Building on that momentum, our friends at Blockworks and Artemis will walk us through how they're making on-chain data available and accessible for allocators. Finally, we'll wrap up with a headline fireside chat with Solana co-founder Anatoly and Bitwise co-founder and CTO Hong on Solana's future roadmap and what that means for investors like you.

So buckle up, we designed today's programming to challenge assumptions, spark new ideas, and give you all the information you will need to allocate into the Solana ecosystem with conviction. Welcome again to Day 1 Breakpoint Allocator Day, and I wanted to introduce our friend and one and only Raoul Pal to the stage. Thank you.

sources.title: Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates
sources.snippet:
Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f0866da8eed4c/6867a1f64ca2c75f0d14f371_16c97ce9017b907297827c5113a068f9_Frame%201597880158.avif)](https://www.drift.trade/)
[
Launch App
](#)
## Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform
December 4, 2025
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f08e5798eed50/693023e13e4b72ada17e0fe2_2025-12-03%2017.19.13.jpg)
[
Contents
](#)
[
Contents
](#)
[
](https://twitter.com/driftprotocol)[
](https://discord.com/invite/fMcZBH8ErM)
[
Trade Now
](https://app.drift.trade/)
![]()
![]()
Drift v3 is the protocol’s biggest performance upgrade yet. Rebuilt around trader execution, v3 delivers**10x faster fills, 10x improved liquidity, and a cleaner, more intuitive interface**than v2.
This upgrade was built for one thing: outperformance. Instant execution. Deeper liquidity. A suite of tools that helps you trade faster and with more confidence.
Drift v2 was the first to bring cross-margin and multi-asset collateral to DeFi on-chain trading. We built on Solana to deliver NASDAQ-level performance on-chain and with major Solana upgrades like Alpenglow, Firedancer and Jito’s Block Assembly Market (BAM), Drift is built to outperform as the network scales.
Since launch, Drift has surpassed 1.5B in TVL, $133B+ in total trading volume and $650M in open interest. Drift v3 is built to take those numbers and your trading even further.
**Drift v3 will be available on Dec 4, 2025.**New users will need an invite code to access Drift v3.
**DM**[**@DriftProtocol**](https://x.com/DriftProtocol)**to request access.**
## Why v3?
Drift v3 represents the protocol’s next stage of maturity: the point where years of infrastructure, liquidity, and execution improvements converge into a faster, clearer, more reliable trading experience.
**Over the past year, Drift has evolved in three critical areas:**
1. Execution speed
2. Liquidity depth
3. Trader experience## How Drift v3 outperforms
*The road to v3 was focused on improving liquidity, trading execution and speed. Here’s what that looks like in practice:*
### **Trading Execution and Speed**
* **10x faster order fills:**On Drift v3, 85% of market orders are filled within the same slot. A slot is Solana’s smallest time unit (about 400 milliseconds). On Drift, that means that trades are executed in under half a second. Instant execution.
* **15x faster take profit/stop loss triggers:**For BTC, it dropped from 15 slots (\~6 seconds) to 1 slot (\~0.4 seconds). This means your risk controls and exits now trigger immediately, reducing slippage and missed opportunities.
* **Gasless trading by default:**Unlike other DEXs, where you pay gas on every trade, Drift abstracts gas fees so that’s one less thing to worry about eating into profits
* **400ms oracle updates**: Prices update every 400 millisecond (roughly 2.5 times per second). This keeps quotes accurate and reduces the chance of stale pricing.
* **Scales with Solana:**As Solana increases block size and throughput, Drift automatically gets faster too, handling more trades per second.### **Liquidity**
* **10x reduction in slippage on market orders:**In Drift v2, large market orders could move the price by 20 bps. In v3, that’s been cut to just 2 bps. Traders now get far better pricing, especially on size.
* **5x tighter TP/SL execution:**Take-profit and stop-loss orders are far more precise. On major markets like SOL and BTC, fills are 4x tighter, while non-majors see up to 5x improvement. This means exits trigger closer to the price you set, reducing losses and protecting gains.
* **Introduction of Drift Liquidity Provider (DLP)**: Provides liquidity for both Perps and Spot markets. Community members can deposit funds into DLP to support market-making and earn a share of the pool's profits. Currently in the testing stage. Public launch in Q1 2026.
* **Expanded Market Maker Program:**With v3’s expanded market maker initiatives, long-tail altcoins now hav

tags.impact_reason: This event is designed to attract institutional investment into the Solana ecosystem, featuring keynotes and discussions with major players like Anatoly and Raoul Pal, potentially leading to significant capital allocation.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic architectural model of a portfolio as the Semantic Anchor because the story is about institutional allocators strategically 'building' their portfolios with Solana as a new, foundational asset. This metaphor of architectural construction captures the active, high-conviction planning described in the transcript, moving beyond a simple vault. I included the diegetic text 'SOL' engraved on the new component to act as a clean, blueprint-style label, identifying the asset being added in a way that feels strategic and integrated.
visual_idea.description: In a dark, cavernous boardroom, a single sharp spotlight from above illuminates a vast, polished obsidian table. On the table sits an intricate architectural model of a cityscape, made of cool, brushed titanium blocks representing a traditional portfolio. A shimmering, holographic hand carefully lowers a new, central skyscraper into an open space in the model. This new tower is constructed from vibrant, internally glowing acrylic blocks. On the titanium foundation of this new tower, the letters 'SOL' are cleanly engraved. The background is a deep, out-of-focus view of floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a nighttime metropolis.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, hyperrealistic image in a 3:4 vertical aspect ratio. In a dark, cavernous boardroom, a single sharp architectural spotlight from directly above dramatically illuminates a vast, polished obsidian table, casting deep shadows. On this table, an intricate architectural model of a cityscape stands, meticulously crafted from cool, textured brushed titanium blocks, representing a traditional portfolio. A shimmering, ethereal holographic hand, with subtle particle glow, carefully and precisely lowers a new, central skyscraper into an open space within the model. This new tower is constructed from vibrant, internally glowing acrylic blocks, emitting a soft, ethereal light. Cleanly engraved letters 'SOL' are visible on the titanium foundation of this new tower. The background features a deep, out-of-focus view of towering floor-to-ceiling windows, overlooking a sprawling, luminous nighttime metropolis, emphasizing epic scale and vast negative space at the top of the composition. Strong contrast, dramatic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, cinematic mood, 8k, octane render, raytracing, photorealistic, hyper-detailed.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic architectural model of a portfolio as the Semantic Anchor because the story is about institutional allocators strategically 'building' their portfolios with Solana as a new, foundational asset. This metaphor of architectural construction captures the active, high-conviction planning described in the transcript, moving beyond a simple vault. I included the diegetic text 'SOL' engraved on the new component to act as a clean, blueprint-style label, identifying the asset being added in a way that feels strategic and integrated.
visual_idea.description: A macro, isometric shot focusing on the point of contact between the architectural model's components. A vibrant, glowing acrylic block representing Solana slots perfectly into place next to cool, non-illuminated, brushed titanium blocks. The light from the acrylic casts a soft, colorful glow and sharp specular highlights onto the metallic surfaces of the adjacent structures, emphasizing the integration of a new, energetic asset into a traditional, established system. The focus is on the textural contrast and the meeting of light and metal.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro, isometric shot, precisely centered and filling the square frame, focuses intensely on the intricate point of contact where architectural model components meet. A vibrant, intensely glowing acrylic block, imbued with subsurface scattering and representing Solana, slots flawlessly into place. This emissive block sits directly adjacent to cool, non-illuminated blocks crafted from meticulously brushed titanium, showcasing its distinctive fine grain texture. The internal light emanating from the acrylic casts a soft, colorful, and volumetric glow onto the surrounding environment, while simultaneously creating sharp, crisp specular highlights on the metallic surfaces of the adjacent brushed titanium structures. This interplay dramatically emphasizes the seamless integration of a new, energetic, and luminous asset into a traditional, established, and grounded system. The composition is a masterclass in textural contrast, highlighting the precise meeting of radiant light and cool, textured metal with extreme clarity and detail. The overall atmosphere is precise, elegant, and high-end, utilizing dramatic architectural spotlighting for strong contrast and photorealistic lighting. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, shallow depth of field, volumetric light, realistic materials, subsurface scattering, 1:1 aspect ratio.

editorial.headline: Solana Breakpoint 2025 Debuts 'Allocator Day' for Institutional Capital
editorial.standfirst: The conference opens with a strategic pivot, offering a closed-door environment for asset managers to evaluate Solana as a portfolio diversifier. This move signals a transition from retail enthusiasm to securing high-conviction institutional allocations.
key_takeaways: Launch of 'Allocator Day', a curated track for LPs and asset managers focused on long-term capital deployment.
Strategic sessions led by **Raoul Pal**, **Multicoin Capital**, and **Bitwise** covering macro trends and portfolio construction.
**Blockworks** and **Artemis** debut tools to improve on-chain data accessibility and transparency for institutional due diligence.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
Solana Breakpoint 2025 has officially shifted gears, opening Day 1 with a curated, closed-door track designed exclusively for the world's top asset allocators. Moving beyond the developer-centric focus of previous years, the conference’s "Allocator Day" aims to bridge the gap between complex on-chain mechanics and the rigorous requirements of institutional portfolios. The programming is explicitly designed to foster long-term relationships and provide the "alpha" necessary for deep-pocketed investors to deploy capital with conviction.

The agenda reflects a maturation of the ecosystem, prioritizing financial utility over speculative narratives. Key sessions include a macro outlook from **Raoul Pal** and a deep dive into Solana’s role in diversified portfolios led by **Multicoin Capital**’s Kyle Samani. Crucially, the content focuses on practical, income-generating strategies and the "menu of options" for institutional LPs, positioning Solana not just as a blockchain, but as the backbone for next-generation financial infrastructure including tokenized equities and DePIN.

Transparency remains a primary hurdle for institutional entry, addressed directly by partnerships with **Blockworks** and **Artemis**. These sessions promise to unlock on-chain data accessibility, providing the auditability and metrics that allocators demand. The day concludes with a forward-looking fireside chat between Solana co-founder **Anatoly Yakovenko** and **Bitwise** CTO Hong Kim, underscoring the strategic alignment between the protocol’s roadmap and the needs of regulated asset managers.
